mapper.sql: id, transaction_date, transaction_time, income_amount, expense_amount, amount_type, transaction_type, transaction_desc, payment_channel, category, category_id, sub_category, sub_category_id, manual_remark, include_in_statistics, manual_entry, data_hash, creator_code, updater_code, creator_name, updater_name, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM bill
ORDER BY transaction_date DESC, transaction_time DESC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount_type = 'INCOME' THEN income_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalIncome, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount_type = 'EXPENSE' THEN expense_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalExpense FROM bill
mapper.update:
UPDATE bill
amount_type = #{amountType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, income_amount = #{incomeAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, expense_amount = #{expenseAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, transaction_date = #{transactionDate,jdbcType=DATE}, transaction_time = #{transactionTime,jdbcType=TIME}, transaction_type = #{transactionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, transaction_desc = #{transactionDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
payment_channel = #{paymentChannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category = #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sub_category = #{subCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_category_id = #{subCategoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, manual_remark = #{manualRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, include_in_statistics = #{includeInStatistics,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updater_code = #{updaterCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updater_name = #{updaterName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND deleted = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(transaction_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount_type = 'EXPENSE' THEN expense_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount_type = 'INCOME' THEN income_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS balance FROM bill WHERE deleted = '0' AND include_in_statistics = '1' AND YEAR(transaction_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(transaction_date) = #{month} GROUP BY transaction_date ORDER BY transaction_date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(transaction_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, daily_expense AS dailyExpense, SUM(COALESCE(daily_expense, 0)) OVER (ORDER BY transaction_date) AS cumulativeExpense FROM (SELECT transaction_date, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount_type = 'EXPENSE' THEN expense_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN amount_type = 'INCOME' THEN income_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS daily_expense FROM bill WHERE deleted = '0' AND include_in_statistics = '1' AND YEAR(transaction_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(transaction_date) = #{month} GROUP BY transaction_date) AS daily ORDER BY transaction_date ASC
